name: Donahue Show- Big Bucket in the Sky Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare at least one large cut-up fryer chicken for cooking.
2. Substitute cream of celery or cream of chicken soup if desired, in which case add 1 tablespoon (T) Paprika.
3. Preheat the oven to bake the chicken for about 30 minutes.
4. While baking, spread butter or margarine on a pan.
